misc.title: On the udon bowl eaten by Fuji, also known as Issho, the word 一笑 is written. It can be read as “Issho” and means “one smile”, which fits his warm and gentle personality.😊 Also, the fox and raccoon do
misc.text: On the udon bowl eaten by Fuji, also known as Issho, the word 一笑 is written. It can be read as “Issho” and means “one smile”, which fits his warm and gentle personality.😊 Also, the fox and raccoon dog are not random. They may come from the famous names of udon dishes.
